errors.unauthorized: You must be signed in to do this.
errors.email_not_verified: Your email must be verified first.
errors.results_after_close: Results are available after the survey closes.
errors.results_after_completion: Please complete all votes to see results.
errors.already_a_participant: You are already participating in this survey.
errors.not_a_participant: You are not a participant in this survey.
errors.must_be_participant: You must be a participant to do this.
errors.only_admin_can_update: Only survey admins can change settings.
errors.only_admin_can_delete: Only survey admins can delete the survey.
errors.only_admin_can_seed: Only admins can add seed statements.
errors.cannot_change_admin_role: The admin role cannot be changed.
errors.moderation_forbidden: Only admins and moderators can access moderation.
errors.moderation_lock: Moderation can only be changed before the survey is activated.
errors.anon_not_allowed: This survey does not accept anonymous voting.
errors.anon_lock: Anonymous voting can only be changed before the survey is activated.
errors.statement_text_length: Statement length is out of the allowed range.
errors.char_min_max_invalid: Minimum statement length must be less than or equal to the maximum.
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.verification_rate_limited: Please wait before requesting another verification email.
errors.current_password_incorrect: The current password you entered is incorrect.
errors.invalid_reset_token: Invalid or expired password reset link.
errors.already_voted: You have already voted on this statement.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.name: Name
auth.forgot-password-info: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.forgot-password-sent: If an account exists with this email, a reset link has been sent.
auth.password-reset-success: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.
auth.verify-email-failed: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
auth.check-email-info: We've sent a verification link to your email. Please check your inbox.
auth.check-spam: Can't find it? Check your spam folder.
auth.magic-link-info: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to log in — no password needed.
auth.magic-link-sent: If an account exists with this email, a login link has been sent. Check your inbox.
auth.password-too-short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.magic-link-failed: This login link is invalid or has expired.

survey.title: Title
survey.activate-confirm: Are you sure you want to activate this survey? Participants will be able to join and vote.
survey.close-confirm: Are you sure you want to close this survey? No more responses will be accepted.
survey.delete-confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the survey "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone and will remove all statements, votes, and participants.
survey.moderation-enabled-help: New participant-submitted statements wait for moderator approval. Can only be changed before the survey is activated.
survey.moderation-disabled-readonly: No moderation — new statements appear immediately
survey.allow-anonymous-help: Participants can vote without signing up if they have the link or scan the QR code. Can only be changed before the survey is activated.
survey.share-exit-hint: Click anywhere or press Esc to exit

statement.submitted-for-moderation: Your statement has been submitted for moderation.
statement.submitted-live: Your statement has been added to the survey.
statement.moderation-hint: Your statement will be reviewed by a moderator before appearing in the survey.

participants.title: Participants
participants.remove-confirm-message: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from this survey?

profile.name: Name
profile.set-password-hint: Set a password to use as an alternative to email link login.

intake.no-fields: No intake fields configured. Participants will join without a form.
